documents.content:
Ollama runs local LLMs.

Common models:
- qwen2.5-coder
- qwen3:1.7b              
- nomic-embed-text:latest

Default API:
http://localhost:11434

Docker allows applications to run in containers.

Key commands:
docker build
docker run
docker compose up

FastAPI is a modern Python web framework.

Features:
- Type hints
- Automatic OpenAPI docs
- High performance
- Async support
